purpose: Record the focused Damage & Threshold plus Attack Combo runtime pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.scope: This pass covers Delay Damage, Dreadful Rage, Advantageous Attack, Attack Combo (Ranged), Attack Combo (Melee), Attack Combo (Fire and Strike), and Hew.
policy.engineReuse: Dreadful Rage is already handled by the existing Rage feat normalization hook. Do not duplicate Rage rules here.
policy.invalidEntries: Delay Damage is a class feature, not a feat. Hew is invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat audit. Do not implement either as a feat.
policy.runtimeConsumers: Advantageous Attack, Attack Combo (Ranged), and Attack Combo (Melee) have runtime consumers through CombatOptionResolver patching and chat-message hit tracking. Attack Combo (Fire and Strike) now has runtime sequence tracking only.
policy.sourcePending: Attack Combo (Fire and Strike) exact benefit text could not be pinned from available sources. The runtime may track mixed ranged+melee sequence activation, but must not apply attack, damage, or action-economy mutations until exact source text is supplied.

implementedEntries.name: Advantageous Attack
implementedEntries.mechanic: When the workflow confirms a target has not acted in combat, adds the missing Heroic Level damage contribution so the attack uses full Heroic Level instead of one-half Heroic Level.

implementedEntries.name: Attack Combo (Ranged)
implementedEntries.mechanic: Tracks consecutive ranged hits against the same target during the same turn. After activation, later qualifying ranged damage rolls until the end of the next round gain +1 weapon die; the qualifying second hit is skipped.

implementedEntries.name: Attack Combo (Melee)
implementedEntries.mechanic: Tracks consecutive melee/unarmed hits against the same target during the same turn. After activation, later qualifying melee/unarmed damage rolls until the end of the next round gain +1 weapon die; the qualifying second hit is skipped.

implementedEntries.name: Attack Combo (Fire and Strike)
implementedEntries.mechanic: Tracks same-target, same-turn mixed ranged+melee hit sequences and stores advisory activation state under attackComboState.advisoryActive. No damage mutation is applied until exact source text is pinned.

alreadyImplementedElsewhere.name: Dreadful Rage
alreadyImplementedElsewhere.reason: Rage feat normalization already stores RAGE_ATTACK_DAMAGE_BONUS_OVERRIDE with +5 attack and +5 damage.

excludedEntries.name: Delay Damage
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid for feat implementation; this is a class feature, not a feat.

excludedEntries.name: Hew
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.
